name: Jilin Aodong Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Jilin Aodong Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd. produces and sells pharmaceutical products in China. The company offers various drugs, such as oral liquid solutions, injections, capsules, granules, pills, tablets, Chinese herbal medicines, powders, syrups, spirits, and ointments, as well as enzymes, biochemical medicine, and plant chemical medicine. It also provides healthcare products. In addition, the company engages in highway construction and toll collection businesses. The company was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Dunhua, China.
